mapper.select: SELECT id, account, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, region, audit_status, status FROM merchant WHERE account = #{account} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT id, account, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, region, audit_status, status FROM merchant WHERE id = #{merchantId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant(account, company_name, contact_name, contact_phone, region, audit_status, status, is_deleted) VALUES (#{account}, #{companyName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{region}, #{auditStatus}, #{status}, FALSE)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shop s LEFT JOIN merchant m ON m.id = s.merchant_id

SELECT s.id, s.merchant_id, m.company_name AS merchant_name, s.region, s.category_id, cat.name AS category_name, s.city_id, c.name AS city_name, s.area_id, a.name AS area_name, s.name, s.cover_url, s.phone, s.score, s.taste_score, s.env_score, s.service_score, s.price_per_capita, s.currency, s.address, s.latitude, s.longitude, s.business_hours, s.summary, s.has_deal, s.open_now, s.status, s.is_deleted, s.tags, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM shop s LEFT JOIN merchant m ON m.id = s.merchant_id LEFT JOIN category cat ON cat.id = s.category_id LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id = s.city_id LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id = s.area_id
ORDER BY s.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT s.id, s.merchant_id, m.company_name AS merchant_name, s.region, s.category_id, cat.name AS category_name, s.city_id, c.name AS city_name, s.area_id, a.name AS area_name, s.name, s.cover_url, s.phone, s.score, s.taste_score, s.env_score, s.service_score, s.price_per_capita, s.currency, s.address, s.latitude, s.longitude, s.business_hours, s.summary, s.has_deal, s.open_now, s.status, s.is_deleted, s.tags, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM shop s LEFT JOIN merchant m ON m.id = s.merchant_id LEFT JOIN category cat ON cat.id = s.category_id LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id = s.city_id LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id = s.area_id WHERE s.id = #{shopId} AND s.region = #{region} AND s.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop( merchant_id, category_id, city_id, area_id, region, name, cover_url, phone, score, taste_score, env_score, service_score, price_per_capita, currency, address, latitude, longitude, business_hours, summary, has_deal, open_now, status, is_deleted, tags ) VALUES ( #{merchantId}, #{categoryId}, #{cityId}, #{areaId}, #{region}, #{name}, #{coverUrl}, #{phone}, #{score}, #{tasteScore}, #{envScore}, #{serviceScore}, #{pricePerCapita}, #{currency}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{businessHours}, #{summary}, #{hasDeal}, #{openNow}, #{status}, FALSE, #{tags} )
mapper.update: UPDATE shop SET merchant_id = #{merchantId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, city_id = #{cityId}, area_id = #{areaId}, region = #{region}, name = #{name}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, phone = #{phone}, score = #{score}, taste_score = #{tasteScore}, env_score = #{envScore}, service_score = #{serviceScore}, price_per_capita = #{pricePerCapita}, currency = #{currency}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, business_hours = #{businessHours}, summary = #{summary}, has_deal = #{hasDeal}, open_now = #{openNow}, status = #{status}, tags = #{tags}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO import_batch(admin_id, region, file_name, total, success, failed, status, error_file) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{region}, #{fileName}, #{total}, #{success}, #{failed}, #{status}, #{errorFile})
mapper.update: UPDATE import_batch SET total = #{total}, success = #{success}, failed = #{failed}, status = #{status}, error_file = #{errorFile} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, admin_id, region, file_name, total, success, failed, status, error_file, created_at FROM import_batch
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
